'''zazhono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabuton|zabuton]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabuton|zabuton]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zazhono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzheneth|zæzheneth]] || [[word:zæzhenej|zæzhenej]] || [[word:zæzhenesh|zæzhenesh]] || [[word:zæzhene|zæzhene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazhozhonoth|zazhozhonoth]] || [[word:zazhozhonoj|zazhozhonoj]] || [[word:zazhozhonosh|zazhozhonosh]] || [[word:zazhozhono|zazhozhono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazhonoth|zazhonoth]] || [[word:zazhonoj|zazhonoj]] || [[word:zazhonosh|zazhonosh]] || [[word:zazhono|zazhono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazhofnoth|zazhofnoth]] || [[word:zazhofnoj|zazhofnoj]] || [[word:zazhofnosh|zazhofnosh]] || [[word:zazhofnof|zazhofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazhonotho|zazhonotho]] || [[word:zazhonojo|zazhonojo]] || [[word:zazhonosho|zazhonosho]] || [[word:zazhonoko|zazhonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazhonoth|zazhonoth]] || [[word:zazhonoj|zazhonoj]] || [[word:zazhonosh|zazhonosh]] || [[word:zazhono|zazhono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazhonothol|zazhonothol]] || [[word:zazhonojol|zazhonojol]] || [[word:zazhonoshol|zazhonoshol]] || [[word:zazhonokol|zazhonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazhonothotho|zazhonothotho]] || [[word:zazhonojojo|zazhonojojo]] || [[word:zazhonoshosho|zazhonoshosho]] || [[word:zazhonoko|zazhonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazhonothon|zazhonothon]] || [[word:zazhonojon|zazhonojon]] || [[word:zazhonoshon|zazhonoshon]] || [[word:zazhonokon|zazhonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazhonothoro|zazhonothoro]] || [[word:zazhonojoro|zazhonojoro]] || [[word:zazhonoshoro|zazhonoshoro]] || [[word:zazhonokoro|zazhonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
